connections.gloss: captain, chief, cloud, governor, prince, ruler, vapour.
captain (that had rule), chief (captain), general, governor, keeper, lord,(-task-)master, prince(-ipal), ruler, steward.
captain, chief, excellent thing, (chief) governor, leader, noble, prince, (chief) ruler.

connections.def: present participle of 757; a first (in rank or power):--chief (ruler), magistrate, prince, ruler. see GREEK for
from 746 and 71; a chief leader:--author, captain, prince. see GREEK for 746 see GREEK for

connections.gloss: captain, guide, prince, ruler. Compare H6278 (עֵת קָצִין).
